title: Log IP Address in Event Log for Audit Traceability
description:
Add the end user's IP address to all event log entries. This enables tracing request origins for security investigations, identifying network-related traffic patterns, and detecting potential credential sharing across geographies.

## Requirements

- Add an IP address column to the event log database table.
- Capture and store the client IP address with every event log entry.
- Use this data to correlate suspicious database events with network traffic.
- Support detection of credential sharing across different geographic locations.
acceptance_criteria: IP address column exists in the event log database table
Every event log entry includes the client's IP address
IP addresses are correctly captured for requests behind Cloudflare
Changes deployed to both staging and production
middleware_changes: Event logging service updated to capture and store the client IP address with every log entry.
data_model_changes: New IP address column added to the event_log database table.
implementation_notes: Added IP address field to the event log database table and updated all event log insertion points to capture request()->ip(). Changes deployed to both staging and production.
comment_summary: Developer added IP address to the database table and event logging code. Changes were pushed to both production and staging.
